nasb.text: But I will come to you after I go through Macedonia, for I am going through Macedonia;

esv.text: I will visit you after passing through Macedonia, for I intend to pass through Macedonia,

cnv.text: 我現在正要路過馬其頓。過了馬其頓，我就會到你們那裡去。

ccb.text: 我正打算从马其顿经过，过了马其顿，我就去探望你们。

csbs.text: 我经过马其顿省以后，就会到你们那里去——因为我要经过马其顿省——
